calendar.matters:
Petn. Of Emily Carson, For Order Auth. Establishment Of Special Needs Trust With Property Of The Principal
Off Calendar May-13-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andy Tran for Emily Carson (Petitioner). Joseph Carson, Principal in Propria Persona.

The Court found that Joseph Carson is a person with a disability. Mr. Tran submitted a revised order to include the following provisions: 1)Trustee must obtain prior Court authorization before accepting additions to the Special Needs Trust. 2)Trustee must obtain prior Court authorization before amending the Special Needs Trust. Mr. Carson consented to waiver of Court accounts, to payment of Trustee's fees and Attorney's fees without prior Court order, to waiver of bond and to the named Successor Trustees. The Court will grant the petition, (subject to review of the order).

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR#7077. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Aquino.

payments.description: PETN AND OPP RE INTERNAL AFFAIRS OF 17200 TRUST
